message:
fix(test): correct discovery_tick_detects_metadata_changes assertion

The test changed both title (bash→vim) AND window/tab IDs, but title
change triggers new_generations (fingerprint mismatch), not changed_panes
(metadata-only change). Fix: keep title as "bash" so fingerprint stays
the same, allowing the window_id/tab_id change to trigger changed_panes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
